name: Prayers for Family
description: Lift up your family members and home to the Lord.

prayers.title: Pray for your spouse
prayers.description: Ask God to bless, protect, and strengthen your marriage.

prayers.title: Pray for your children
prayers.description: Ask God to guide, protect, and grow your children in faith.

prayers.title: Pray for your parents
prayers.description: Thank God for your parents and ask Him to bless them with health and joy.

prayers.title: Pray for family unity
prayers.description: Ask God to heal any divisions and bring your family closer together.

prayers.title: Pray for extended family
prayers.description: Lift up aunts, uncles, cousins, and grandparents by name.

prayers.title: Pray for future generations
prayers.description: Ask God to establish a legacy of faith in your family line.

prayers.title: Pray for prodigal family members
prayers.description: Intercede for family members who have wandered from faith.
